description: Fixed with no drama! 🛠️✨ Just finished a tricky restoration on "Saielle of the Willow Tree" from the vintage Enchanted Woodland Faeries collection. The wing's mounting stud had snapped off completely and was wedged deep inside her back. I carefully drilled out the broken fragment, embedded a metal screw into the wing base for stability, and re-sculptured the outer peg using UV resin. The new stud is incredibly strong and fits perfectly! 🧚‍♀️
